message:
⚠️ Policy Premium Overdue — Lapse Warning

Dear Agent,

Policy {{ doc.name }} for customer {{ doc.customer }} is 15 days past due on premium payment.

Policy{{ doc.name }}
Customer{{ doc.customer }}
Premium Amount₹{{ doc.premium_amount }}
Due Date{{ doc.next_premium_date }}
Product{{ doc.insurance_product }}

The policy will be marked as Lapsed in approximately 15 days if payment is not received.

Please contact the customer immediately to collect the premium and avoid policy lapse.

This is an automated reminder from the Insurance Management System.
name: Premium Lapse Warning
subject: ⚠️ Premium 15 Days Overdue — Policy {{ doc.name }} May Lapse
